blocks.value: 1MAX offers a Fixed-Term Staking product that allows you to earn interest on your cryptocurrency.
Interest is calculated based on Annualized Percentage Rate (APR)
APR Formula:
Subscribed Amount × APR ÷ 365 × Locking Period (days)
Any registered 1MAX user who has completed KYC verification and;
Account security measures (such as phone number binding or Google Authenticator) must be enabled.
Subscriptions are available between “Locking Starts” and “Locking Ends.”
After Locking Ends, no further subscriptions are allowed.
Once a subscription is confirmed, assets are locked for the entire Locking Period.
Early redemption is not supported to ensure stable and fair returns for all participants.

faqs.question: 4. How to participate in a staking project?

blocks.value: Select a preferred staking project.
Enter the desired staking amount.
Confirm the subscription.
Assets are locked after subscription, and interest accrual begins after the Locking Ends time.
Staking is available once the minimum required amount for each asset is reached.
Interest begins accruing at 00:00 (UTC) on the day after Locking Ends.
Interest accrues daily until the end of the Locking Period.
Interest is calculated daily but credited only after the staking period is completed.
Both principal and interest are automatically released after the staking period ends.
Example: If Locking Ends on 16 January, interest begins accruing on 17 January.

faqs.question: 7. Where can I view my earnings?

blocks.value: Navigate to Staking > My Staking History to see detailed information about staking and rewards.

faqs.question: 8. Can additional funds be added after subscribing?

blocks.value: Yes, additional subscriptions can be made after the initial subscription.
Each additional subscription will be treated as a separate staking order and will follow its own staking term and conditions.
